title: JSON schema for FinPress fp-env configuration files

core.description: The FinPress installation to use. If null is specified, fp-env will use the latest production release of FinPress.

phpVersion.description: The PHP version to use. If null is specified, fp-env will use the default version used with production release of FinPress.

plugins.description: A list of plugins to install and activate in the environment.

themes.description: A list of themes to install in the environment.

port.description: The primary port number to use for the installation. You'll access the instance through the port: http://localhost:8888

config.description: Mapping of fp-config.php constants to their desired values.

mappings.description: Mapping of FinPress directories to local directories to be mounted in the FinPress instance.

phpmyadminPort.description: The port number to access phpMyAdmin.

multisite.description: Whether to set up a multisite installation.

env.description: The key env is available to override any of the above options on an individual-environment basis.

testsPort.description: The port number for the test site. You'll access the instance through the port: http://localhost:8889

lifecycleScripts.description: Mapping of commands that should be executed at certain points in the lifecycle.

afterStart.description: Runs after fp-env start has finished setting up the environment.

afterClean.description: Runs after fp-env clean has finished cleaning the environment.

afterDestroy.description: Runs after fp-env destroy has destroyed the environment.
